zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Matthew Browne於大約1473年出生在英國素瑞貝華斯時，他的父親Sir George Browne34歲，母親Elizabeth Paston36歲。他於大約1499年與Frideswide Guildford在英國英格蘭素瑞貝華斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年9月6日在他的家鄉享年85歲，埋葬在英國素瑞多爾金。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Matthew Browne于大约1473年出生在英国素瑞貝華斯时，他的父亲Sir George Browne34岁，母亲Elizabeth Paston36岁。他于大约1499年与Frideswide Guildford在英国英格兰素瑞貝華斯结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1557年9月6日在他的家乡享年85岁，埋葬在英国素瑞多爾金。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Matthew Browne was born about 1473, in Betchworth, Surrey, England, his father, Sir George Browne, was 34 and his mother, Elizabeth Paston, was 36. He married Frideswide Guildford about 1499, in Betchworth, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 6 September 1557, in his hometown, at the age of 85, and was buried in Dorking, Surrey, England.

fr.Ottery St Mary, Devon, England: Ottery St Mary, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Matthew Browne est né environ 1473, à Betchworth, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Sir George Browne, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Paston, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Frideswide Guildford environ 1499, à Betchworth, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 6 septembre 1557, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Dorking, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.Ottery St Mary, Devon, England: Ottery St Mary, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Matthew Browne um 1473 in Betchworth, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir George Browne 34 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Paston 36. Er hat um 1499 in Betchworth, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Frideswide Guildford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 6. September 1557 im Alter von 85 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dorking, Surrey, England begraben.

ko.Ottery St Mary, Devon, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터이 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Matthew Browne(이)가 대략 1473년 영국 수리 베트ch워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir George Browne(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Paston(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 베트ch워스에서 Frideswide Guildford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 9월 6일 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 도르킨그에 묻혔다.

ru.Ottery St Mary, Devon, England: оттири ст мэри, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Matthew Browne родился около 1473 г. в местности бечворт, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir George Browne было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Paston, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Frideswide Guildford около 1499 г. в местности бечворт, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 6 сентября 1557 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности доркинг, сурри, Англия.
